Yay! ようこそ！
えっと、左上にハッシュタグがありまして...

subtitles.english: There's a hashtag on the upper left corner.

subtitles.original: It reads #ReineMEPtember2025, which is pretty much the same hashtag I've been using for the past few years, yeah?
subtitles.english: It reads #ReineMEPtember2025, which is pretty much the same hashtag I've been using for the past few years, yeah?

subtitles.original: And if you guys have any thoughts throughout the live, anything, you can write it and I'll be looking forward to them.
subtitles.english: And if you guys have any thoughts throughout the live, anything, you can write it and I'll be looking forward to them.

subtitles.english: I'm mixing languages here and there, but yeah, it's like that.

subtitles.original: I'm excited to know what you guys think of the live. You don't have to write it now.
subtitles.english: I'm excited to know what you guys think of the live. You don't have to write it now.

subtitles.original: 今じゃなくても大丈夫です。
subtitles.english: It doesn't have to be right now.

subtitles.original: But I will be waiting! Yeah, so just put any of your thoughts in the hashtag, okay?
subtitles.english: But I will be waiting! Yeah, so just put any of your thoughts in the hashtag, okay?

subtitles.original: And next, I want to talk about the concept of the stage. Look at this! It's so cool, right?
subtitles.english: And next, I want to talk about the concept of the stage. Look at this! It's so cool, right?

subtitles.original: There's a mysterious flame, mysterious locks, mysterious cans, mysterious...
subtitles.english: There's a mysterious flame, mysterious locks, mysterious cans, mysterious...

subtitles.original: Where's the liquid? Well, there was like a blue liquid there, but I mean you saw it, right? Yeah.
subtitles.english: Where's the liquid? Well, there was like a blue liquid there, but I mean you saw it, right? Yeah.

subtitles.original: If you, um, I guess if you think of fire or flame, you know...
subtitles.english: If you, um, I guess if you think of fire or flame, you know...

subtitles.original: Usually you guys think of the color red, right? Automatically.
subtitles.english: Usually you guys think of the color red, right? Automatically.

subtitles.original: そうですね、あの火といえばですね、赤のイメージが強いかもしれませんが...
subtitles.english: That's right, when you think of fire, you might have a strong image of red...

subtitles.original: But actually, the blue flame is the strongest. Iya nggak sih?
subtitles.english: But actually, the blue flame is the strongest. Right?

subtitles.original: But actually, 実はですね、青い炎が一番強いと思います。
subtitles.english: But actually, in fact, I think the blue flame is the strongest.

subtitles.original: Yeah, so that's the theme of today's birthday.
subtitles.english: Yeah, so that's the theme of today's birthday.

subtitles.original: I want to show you guys just how hot a blue flame can be through hot songs...
subtitles.english: I want to show you guys just how hot a blue flame can be through hot songs...

subtitles.original: ...and songs that will make you feel, aduh gerah banget, so atsui, so phew! gitu.
subtitles.english: ...and songs that will make you feel, oh man it's so hot, so hot, so phew! Like that.

subtitles.original: Pokoknya, just look forward to it, okay?
subtitles.english: Anyway, just look forward to it, okay?

subtitles.original: And the songs we've sang today, we have two songs.
subtitles.english: And the songs we've sang today, we have two songs.

subtitles.original: The first one was 'Kill Kiss'.
そうですね、すごく好きな曲で、阿部真央様の『Kill Kiss』です。
subtitles.english: That's right, it's a song I really like, 'Kill Kiss' by Abe Mao.

subtitles.original: そして2曲目は、私がすごい大好きなあのプロセカのユニット、Vivid BAD SQUAD様の『CRaZY』でした。
subtitles.english: And the second song was 'CRaZY' by that Proseka unit I really love, Vivid BAD SQUAD.

subtitles.original: And the second song was 'CRaZY' from a unit I really, really like from Proseka, by Vivid BAD SQUAD.
subtitles.english: And the second song was 'CRaZY' from a unit I really, really like from Proseka, by Vivid BAD SQUAD.

subtitles.original: I hope you guys enjoyed it! Yay!
subtitles.english: I hope you guys enjoyed it! Yay!

subtitles.original: Emang kayak Reine tuh suka banget gitu sama lagunya.
subtitles.english: Reine really, really likes the song.

subtitles.original: Jadi masih akan ada lebih banyak lagi. There's gonna be way more, more, more, more songs...
subtitles.english: So there's still going to be more. There's gonna be way more, more, more, more songs...

subtitles.original: ...and I'm sure there's a lot of guests. I hope you guys are excited for them.
subtitles.english: ...and I'm sure there's a lot of guests. I hope you guys are excited for them.

subtitles.original: これからもね、もっともっと熱くなるからね。
subtitles.english: It's going to get even hotter from here on out.

subtitles.original: ゲストも many many many many many! So please look forward to it!
subtitles.english: The guests are many many many many many! So please look forward to it!
